name: readgzh
description: Let AI read full-text WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) articles. Cloud-based, zero-install. Returns title, author, publish time, and clean article content. Supports standard articles and image-post formats. Includes search, list, and AI summary tools.

auth.description: Optional API Key. Public access available with daily IP rate limit (10/day). API Key bypasses IP limits and unlocks higher quotas.

pricing.free_tier: 30 credits/day for registered users, 10 reads/day for anonymous IP

tools.name: readgzh.read
tools.description: Read and extract the full text of a WeChat article from its mp.weixin.qq.com URL. Returns Markdown with title, author, publish time, and content. Cached automatically.

tools.name: readgzh.search
tools.description: Search cached WeChat articles by keyword in titles and content.

tools.name: readgzh.get
tools.description: Get a previously cached WeChat article by its slug. Supports paginated reading of long articles.

examples.title: Read a WeChat article shared by the user
Search Chinese AI articles
examples.prompt: Find recent WeChat articles about DeepSeek

highlights: Cloud-based — no local WeChat desktop installation required
Shared cache — previously read articles cost 0 credits for everyone
CDN image proxy — permanent image access, no expiry
AI structured summaries via mode=summary (Pro tier)
